workspace.name: Social Cues
workspace.purpose: Launch Social Cues as a customer-ready social command center

onboarding.bio: This workspace is testing Social Cues as an end-user customer.
onboarding.purpose: Use Social Cues to launch itself with a repeatable social growth engine, customer-ready onboarding, media planning, account connections, and revenue path.
onboarding.audience: Creators, small businesses, agencies, and ecommerce operators

campaigns.title: Social Cues Customer-Ready Launch
campaigns.brief: Launch Social Cues as the social command center for creators, small businesses, agencies, and ecommerce operators. Show how it helps a customer log in, connect social accounts, analyze metrics, generate platform-native campaigns, attach or generate media, approve content, and turn results into a repeatable growth system.

offers.name: Founder Audit
offers.description: Diagnose one underperforming page and deliver a first campaign plan.

offers.name: Managed Proof Sprint
offers.description: Run a proof sprint with content, metrics, and next moves.

offers.name: Social Cues Pro
offers.description: Self-serve workspace for campaigns, approvals, media, and analytics.

proof.note: Social Cues moved from visual prototype into a persistent customer-ready command center with onboarding, accounts, campaigns, approvals, media, billing, exports, and growth diagnosis.

actions.title: Run Social Cues self-launch sprint
actions.signal: At least one campaign shipped, evidence captured, and one reusable launch insight captured.

actions.title: Map direct publishing developer accounts
actions.signal: Prepare TikTok, Meta, YouTube, and X app requirements for approval-first scheduling.

activity.message: Seed model stored on disk for Social Cues test runs.
